form.formComment: Comes off a 34 day let-up. Most recently second last of 9 at this track on March 3 over 1400m, 24 len behind Pod Despair carrying 56kg at $176.30. The start before that 9th of 12 at this track on February 5 over 1400m, 9 len behind Dere Handsome with 56kg at $92. Needs to do more. Others better.
